name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express is a multi-service financial services company offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, title loans, installment loans, and tax services at physical locations.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates as a storefront financial services provider with a nationwide network of physical locations. The company has been serving consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banking for decades, positioning itself as an accessible solution for unbanked and underbanked populations. Their primary business model centers on providing fast, in-person financial transactions without requiring a traditional bank account.

ACE offers a diverse suite of services beyond their core check cashing business, including installment loans, title loans, money transfers, bill payment services, business services, tax services, and prepaid cards. The website indicates they provide both in-store and online loan products, with specific mention of "Online Loans" as an available option. Their service availability varies by state, as evidenced by messaging indicating that certain loan types are not available in specific states like Colorado.

The company maintains customer service infrastructure with dedicated phone lines for general inquiries and online loan operations, suggesting they operate at scale with multiple service channels. They also demonstrate compliance awareness by featuring California Notice at Collection information prominently, indicating regulatory sophistication. The presence of a store locator tool and mentions of temporary closures (Hurricane Ida in New Orleans) confirms their multi-location operational model.

ACE represents a traditional alternative financial services provider, best suited for consumers who prefer in-person transactions and need rapid access to cash or financial services. However, the 404 errors on specific location pages suggest potential website maintenance issues that may impact online service accessibility. Consumers should verify current service availability by contacting locations directly or using their store locator tool, as state-by-state service restrictions appear to apply.
pros: Multiple service offerings in one location including check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and loans
Online loan options available for customers preferring digital channels
Nationwide network of physical store locations for in-person transactions
Same-day or next-day funding available for qualifying loans based on category description
Dedicated customer service lines for general and online loan inquiries
Business services available in addition to consumer offerings
Tax services provided at select locations
cons: State-by-state service restrictions mean not all products are available everywhere (e.g., certain loans unavailable in Colorado)
Website technical issues (404 errors on location pages) may make it difficult to find specific store information
As a payday/title loan provider, likely carries high APR rates typical of the emergency cash category
Limited transparency on fee structures and APR rates visible in provided website content
Service availability varies by location with no clear online application status for all products
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate cash access without a bank account
People requiring check cashing services and bill payment options at physical locations
Consumers seeking title loans or short-term installment loans in states where ACE operates
Individuals who prefer in-person financial transactions over online banking
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers who need immediate cash access and prefer in-person transactions at physical locations, particularly those without traditional bank accounts. The primary caveat is that service availability is highly state-dependent, specific loan products are restricted in certain states, and as a check-cashing and title loan provider, ACE carries the high-fee characteristics typical of alternative financial services. Consumers should verify what services are available in their state before visiting or applying.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
